status: Added Lumen unified identity/authorization/entitlement/security/object governance layers plus next 500 domain-aspect continuity containers
hardCodedRules: Lumen users may access through OS, website, Vault-mediated flows, ChatGPT/OpenAI bridge, or future native AI.
Website-only Lumen users are first-class users.
Identity, authorization, entitlements, Vault records, and recovery must connect across channels.
OpenAI/ChatGPT is bridge/adaptor, not final authority.
Future native replacement must preserve continuity.
No access path may bypass applicable Vault, entitlement, authorization, consent, or security governance.
Preservation-first and additive-first apply to everything.
No scaffolds, placeholders, or fake final systems for live/final builds.
